title: Character
description: One playable character. Owned and written ONLY by its player's client. schemaVersion is required on every record; all future changes must be additive with defaults.

playerKey.description: The human behind the character. Links to players/{playerKey}/profile.json

origin.description: Home culture; determines available power system. 'valley' = unaligned, may learn either at higher cost.

background.description: e.g. former-professional, community-organizer, craftsman, survivalist, medic

attributes.description: 1-4 at creation (12 points), can grow to 6

alignment.description: 12-axis spectrum fingerprint, spectrumId -> [-1,1]. Accumulates from actions via EWMA.

attunement.description: Governs sense-of-success tier. Grows with ability use and level.

deeds.description: Append-only memorable actions. Reputation with any community derives from deeds it has witnessed/heard of.

communityId.description: Community that witnessed it. null = unwitnessed (still shapes alignment, not reputation).

tags.description: e.g. child-rescuer, thief, peacemaker, violent, scholar

spread.description: Other communityIds that have since heard of it (world-tick fills this in v0.3).

chronicle.description: One-line summaries per scene, oldest first. Compressed when long.

activeScene.description: Serialized in-progress scene so a closed tab resumes exactly where it left off.
